method: enriched contract → core/emit-html (wrapped library tokens + minted token custom properties) vs the ORIGINAL npm package rendering, same pinned Chromium, per combo × interaction; computed-equality over the styled channel set (exact string, no tolerance) + pixelmatch at threshold 0 (AA counted) and 0.1 (AA excluded) — both quoted, never widened
